main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'biofouling 1ª etapa' + DAF + SBS captura múltiples factores.

alternatives.justification: 4 alts de 3 familias (Fe coloidal, orgánico, SCAL, OXID) anclados.

recommended_action.justification: CIP dos pasos canónico: alcalino NaOH+EDTA+surfactante 35°C + cítrico 2% pH 2.5-3.0.

requested_data.justification: Pide perfil ΔP por elemento + autopsia HPC+LOI — multi-trigger match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi-umbral: Fe>30% + LOI<15% + HPC bajo → switch a Fe/SCAL.
